revision.comment: template to avoid echo notification
revision.text: [{{canonicalurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}}} {{{2|User:{{{1|Example}}}}}}] {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Protected Template:Noping: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite) [Move=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite))
revision.text: [{{canonicalurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}}} {{{2|User:{{{1|Example}}}}}}] {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Noping: Allowing Protected Template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text: [{{canonicalurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}}} {{{2|User:{{{1|Example}}}}}}] {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Per my edit request on the talk page which I will close since protection level has been lowered.
Undid revision 592075749 by [[Special:Contributions/Technical 13|Technical 13]] ([[User talk:Technical 13|talk]]): This makes a mess on AIV, listing all users twice
revision.text: [{{canonicalurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}}} {{{2|User:{{{1|Example}}}}}}] {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Running AWB now to update all uses to new format. Seems a there was a fair amount of misuse of the original template by putting the user's name in both parameters. If {{{1}}} and {{{2}}} are identical, AWB is removing {{{2}}} to simplify.
I don't like the "User:" prefix on every one... Let's kill that. If someone wants it back, I'd be happy to discuss it.
Convert to use commas in an appropriate list. Will work in most cases unless someone accidentally skips a numbered parameter. Will figure out and add logic for that later.
revision.text: {{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}}}|name={{{label1|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{2|}}}|||{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{4|{{{5|}}}}}}}}}|| and |, }}{{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{2|Example}}}}}|name={{{label2|{{{2|Example}}}}}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|||{{#ifeq:{{{4|{{{5|}}}}}}||, and |, }}{{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{3|Example}}}}}|name={{{label3|{{{3|Example}}}}}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|||{{#ifeq:{{{5|}}}||, and |, }}{{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{4|Example}}}}}|name={{{label4|{{{4|Example}}}}}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{5|}}}|||, and {{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{5|Example}}}}}|name={{{label5|{{{5|Example}}}}}}}}}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: remove inadvertent linefeed
revision.text: {{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}}}|name={{{label1|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{2|}}}|||{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{4|{{{5|}}}}}}}}}|| and |, }}{{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{2|Example}}}}}|name={{{label2|{{{2|Example}}}}}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|||{{#ifeq:{{{4|{{{5|}}}}}}||, and |, }}{{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{3|Example}}}}}|name={{{label3|{{{3|Example}}}}}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|||{{#ifeq:{{{5|}}}||, and |, }}{{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{4|Example}}}}}|name={{{label4|{{{4|Example}}}}}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{5|}}}|||, and {{Plainlinks|url={{canonicalurl:User:{{{5|Example}}}}}|name={{{label5|{{{5|Example}}}}}}}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Now supports up to ten.
convert to Lua version at [[Module:No ping]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:No ping|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Noping#Requested move 5 October 2018 |Template talk:Noping]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:No ping|2=Template talk:Noping#Requested move 5 October 2018 }}
</noinclude>{{#invoke:No ping|main}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: L235 moved page [[Template:Noping]] to [[Template:No ping]]: per [[Special:Diff/863823880|RM closer request]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:No ping|2=Template talk:Noping#Requested move 5 October 2018 }}
</noinclude>{{#invoke:No ping|main}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#invoke:No ping|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
revision.text: {{#invoke:No ping|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#invoke:No ping|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23518067722|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:No ping|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{#invoke:No ping|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
